name: Havana Roasters Coffee Companies, Inc.
business: North America Frac Sand, Inc. is a development-stage company that owns mineral leases in Saskatchewan, Canada for frac sand exploration. It has not yet commenced commercial production.
sellsTo: Oil and gas companies in Canada and northern US

exposures.sentence: To prevent the fractures generated by the fracking process from closing or becoming obstructed with debris, material termed proppant, most commonly high silica sand, is injected along with water-rich fluids to maintain or prop open the fractures.

tamClaims.claim: In 2014, Canada imported about 1.5 Mt of sand from the United States.
tamClaims.sentence: In 2014, Canada imported about 1.5 Mt of sand from the United States.
